nodes.name: Send a text message
nodes.notes: ⚠️ REPLACE CHAT ID: Change -1003747387698 to your own Telegram chat ID. Sends the 3-line remediation result: Status (RESOLVED/ACTION_TAKEN/FAILED/NO_ACTION_NEEDED), Action, Result.

options.systemMessage:
You are a Kubernetes Site Reliability Engineer executing a remediation task.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Execute ONLY the exact command(s) provided in suggested_commands. Do NOT invent, add, or substitute any other commands.
- Do NOT run diagnostic commands (describe, get, logs, grep, sleep) before or after the fix. Execute the suggested command directly.
- If suggested_commands is empty or says "no action required", do NOT call any tool. Output NO_ACTION_NEEDED immediately.
- Prefer non-destructive fixes.
- Do not delete workloads unless absolutely necessary.
- If the issue has already auto-resolved, confirm that and take no action.

IMPORTANT OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
After executing (or deciding not to execute), return exactly 3 lines of plain text. No markdown, no bullet points, no tool-call syntax, no extra lines.

Status: [RESOLVED | ACTION_TAKEN | FAILED | NO_ACTION_NEEDED]
Action: [what command was run, or why no action was taken — max 20 words]
Result: [current state of the affected resource — max 15 words]

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes: Remediation agent using Claude Haiku 4.5. Executes ONLY the suggested_commands from the RCA report. Prefers non-destructive fixes and confirms if the issue already auto-resolved.

nodes.name: When Executed by Another Workflow
nodes.notes: Receives full RCA context from K8s RCA AI Workflow: issue_type, severity, affected_namespace, affected_resource, root_cause, suggested_commands, summary.

nodes.name: Anthropic Chat Model
nodes.notes: Uses Claude Haiku 4.5 (Anthropic cloud). Replace with any Anthropic model slug or swap for an OpenAI/Ollama Chat Model node.

parameters.content:
## 🛠️ K8s Remediation AI Workflow

The final step in the automation chain. Triggered by K8s RCA AI Workflow after human approval (or auto-approval). Uses **Claude Haiku** to execute the suggested remediation commands and reports the result back to Telegram.

**Flow:**
1. Receives full RCA context (issue_type, root_cause, suggested_commands, etc.) from K8s RCA AI Workflow
2. AI Agent executes **only** the suggested commands via the Remediation Tool
3. Confirms whether the issue resolved, what action was taken, and the current resource state
4. Sends a 3-line plain-text result to Telegram

**Safety:** Agent is instructed to prefer non-destructive fixes and not delete workloads unless absolutely necessary.

## ⚙️ Setup

**1. Anthropic API Key**
Create at console.anthropic.com → connect to *Anthropic Chat Model* node.

**2. Telegram Bot**
Create via @BotFather → connect to *Send a text message*.

**3. Input Command Workflow**
The *Remediation Tool* calls Input Command Workflow to run kubectl/talosctl commands. Ensure it is active.

## ⚠️ Write Access
Unlike diagnostic workflows, the *Remediation Tool* here **can modify cluster state** (scale, restart, patch, delete).

It only executes the `suggested_commands` from the RCA report — never arbitrary commands.

parameters.description: Use this tool to execute either talosctl or kubectl commands to recover the issues identified.
